name: feature_004_structured_summary_output
description: Add a summary field that appears in both programmatic audit results and CLI output formats.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this is small feature work because it expands the audit contract with a new structured summary field that must flow through reporting and CLI rendering. It is not a disguised bug fix because the existing result schema is valid; the task adds new observable behavior.
mutability_notes: Non-trivial because the summary must be generated from validation state and surfaced consistently in both programmatic and CLI JSON/text pathways.
